data.content: Patched terminal-manager error-exit telemetry so rolledBack is recorded only when the post-exit beat state was actually an action state and invariant enforcement succeeded. Added regression coverage for the queue-state/no-alternate-agent path to assert rolledBack=false and no rollback call. Validation: bun run test src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-error-retry.test.ts, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Note: bun run lint fails repo-wide on pre-existing issues because eslint scans nested worktrees and .next artifacts outside this change.
